name: @storytree/forest-world-r3f
description: The ADR-0123 THIRD forest-world mapper (owned by the website-experience story): React Three Fiber / three.js. Two layers behind the provability firewall: the pure world-to-3D descriptor mapping (world-to-3d.ts — semantic scene layer in, typed 3D instance descriptors out; node:test-provable, no React/three imports) and the thin R3F canvas shell + drei MapControls dev harness that draws the descriptors (browser-bound by design — that is strategy C's point). Consumes @storytree/forest-world's semantic layer (buildScene / SceneKind / SceneStatus / variants), SUPPLIES its own 3D geometry — the deterministic world computation is reused, never re-derived. Synced into the public site as an artifact (ADR-0093 §3, extended by web-experience-sync).
